# Runtime Format Check

This guide checks the tiny `dali-ui-app` documentation format for `runtime-format-check`.

## Table of Contents

- [Create a View](#create-a-view)
- [Name the View](#name-the-view)

## Create a View

Use `Dali::Ui::View` as the preferred object model for this feature.

```cpp
Dali::Ui::View view = Dali::Ui::View::New();
view.SetName("RuntimeFormatCheck");
```

## Name the View
